description:
Implement `hx-help-text` (T4 Infrastructure) ‚Äî standardized help/hint text displayed below form fields, used by hx-field as a consistent sub-component.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-help-text/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-help-text.ts`, `hx-help-text.styles.ts`, `hx-help-text.stories.ts`, `hx-help-text.test.ts`

**Props:** `variant` (`default`|`error`|`warning`|`success`), `id` (string ‚Äî for aria-describedby linking from form controls)

**Slots:** default (help text content)

**CSS Parts:** `base`

**ARIA:** `role="note"` or no role (let it be normal text). The `id` prop is critical ‚Äî form controls reference this element via `aria-describedby`. Study how `hx-field` currently references help text to ensure consistency.

**Tokens:** Uses `--hx-font-*` (caption size), `--hx-color-*` (text color per variant). Error variant uses danger color, warning uses warning color, success uses success color.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (variant colors, id association), axe-core zero violations, Storybook with form field integration demo, bundle < 2KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-help-text ‚Äî T4 Form Field Help Text
